title: Knowing Eye
full_title: Knowing Eye: A Web-Based Examination Platform with Behavior Monitoring Using Facial and Postural Analysis
subject: BSIT Capstone

vision.problem_statement: Online examination systems lack reliable real-time behavioral monitoring, resulting in increased cheating risks and heavy reliance on manual supervision.
vision.solution: A centralized web-based examination platform integrated with AI-powered behavioral monitoring using computer vision and deep learning.
vision.core_goal: Enhance examination integrity, automate proctoring, and provide data-driven behavioral insights.
